subject: [PATCH 04/13] mm/huge_memory: move softleaf_to_folio() inside migration branch

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch moves the call to softleaf_to_folio() inside a migration branch in the change_non_present_huge_pmd() function, ensuring that it only occurs when a folio pointer is actually needed and valid. This prevents potential crashes caused by bogus pointers produced for swap entries. The approach taken is to conditionally call softleaf_to_folio() based on the type of entry being processed.
